/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ecl_test_references.dir/references.cpp.o -o ecl_test_references  -Wl,-rpath,/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_type_traits/lib ../../gtest/libgtest_main.a ../../gtest/libgtest.a -pthread /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1
